settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure the AI decision engine (LLM), concurrency limits, and system behavior preferences.

general.title: General Settings
general.desc: Manage basic display and interaction behaviors of the client.
general.language_hint: Change the client display language (requires restart or refresh).

llm.title: Neural Core Configuration (LLM API)
llm.desc: Configure the LLM driving the Agent's decision tree and page parsing (GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet recommended).
llm.api_key_hint: Keys are securely encrypted locally and never uploaded.
llm.fetch_error_missing: Please enter Base URL and API Key first.

agent.title: Agent Execution Parameters
agent.desc: Fine-tune fault tolerance, CDP latency, and humanization heuristics in high-concurrency environments.
agent.concurrency_hint: High concurrency may lead to OOM. Adjust based on host specs.
agent.delay_hint: Adds latency to clicks and typing to simulate human operation, massively reducing bot detection rates.
agent.healing_hint: Allows the Agent to dynamically re-evaluate and fix the execution chain up to 3 times upon element mismatch.

advanced.title: Advanced Security & Privacy
advanced.danger_desc: Modifying these settings may result in process crashes or compromise L1 fingerprint isolations. For advanced devs only.
advanced.hybrid_hint: Hides all physical browser windows except the Live Frame to minimize GPU consumption.
advanced.webrtc_hint: Disables underlying traffic sniffing and IP masking. Only use when temporarily debugging proxy protocols.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Orchestrate dynamic ephemeral sessions via natural language.
dashboard.core_footer: Core: VeilEngine CLI / L1 Kernel Masking Active

chat.placeholder: Command the agent (e.g., 'Extract product pricing from...')

proxy_manager.title: Proxy Network
proxy_manager.description: Manage all upstream nodes in the VeilBrowser infrastructure, with distribution provided by the Local Gateway.
proxy_manager.empty_manual: No local static nodes yet. Click 'Add Static Node' to get started.
proxy_manager.fill_fields: Please fill in node alias and address

identities.title: Identities
identities.description: Highly isolated vault for business passwords and developer API keys. The underlying Rust engine strictly enforces Access Grants during CDP runtime injections, ensuring L1 isolation.

modal.title: Create Identity
modal.danger_desc: Values stored here are strictly isolated. LLMs and agents can only request them via explicit Access Grants at runtime. Raw keys are NEVER exported directly.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Manage global Chrome extensions. The system automatically patches manifest incompatibilities (e.g. removing unsupported keys) to support running in CEF.

contexts.title: Contexts
contexts.description: Manage physical browser sandboxes with isolated fingerprints. These are neutral environment nodes awaiting dispatch instructions. Each container runs in L1 deep isolation.
contexts.empty: No contexts allocated. Create a sandbox container first.

modal.title: Configure & Generate Sandbox
modal.network_hint: Once bound, all UDP/TCP traffic will be tunneled through our Rust SOCKS5 gateway.

canvas.title: Canvas Defense
canvas.desc: Apply consistent micro-offsets to 2D Canvas fingerprint hashes.

webgl.title: WebGL Renderer
webgl.desc: Spoof GPU Vendor and Unmasked Renderer information.

audio.title: AudioContext
audio.desc: Inject waveform noise based on device sound card characteristics.

fonts.title: Font List & Glyphs
fonts.desc: Prevent cross-tracking via font probing techniques.

taskruns.title: Task Runs
taskruns.description: Monitor active execution pipelines, running sandboxes, and LLM reasoning telemetry.

manual_intercept.title: Manual Intercept Required
manual_intercept.desc: The target site has triggered a CAPTCHA or security checkpoint. Please take control of the browser session to clear it.

modal.title: Agentic Orchestration
modal.desc: In VeilBrowser AgentOS, tasks are launched dynamically by the LLM from the Command Center Dashboard. You can also manually trigger a test pipeline here.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.description: Manage data assets produced by the Agent during task execution (screenshots, downloads, reports). All files are sandboxed and isolated.
artifacts.search_placeholder: Search by filename or task ID...
artifacts.empty: No artifacts yet. Screenshots and reports generated by the Agent will appear here.

logs.title: System Logs
logs.description: Global debug log stream from all subsystems. Aggregated from Rust core, CEF render workers, and SolidJS frontend.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Monitor the underlying ephemeral browser profiles currently orchestrated by the Agent. Each session runs in L1 deep isolation.

skills.title: Skill Ecosystem
skills.description: Natural Language Driven Browser Automation. Pure Markdown, Zero Code.
skills.dynamic_inference_warning: The system will launch LLM for dynamic inference: this skill has no 0-Cost Action Caching or is missing required parameters.

editor.title: Authoring Workshop
editor.ai_hint_desc: Write business logic in plain Markdown. VeilBrowser will automatically discover selectors at runtime and cache them for zero-token execution.
editor.cache_desc: Upon the first run of a natural language script, the Agent triggers an LLM-driven exploration layer to map visual elements. Once successful, the absolute interaction nodes are permanently serialized into an implicit cache (.action-cache.json). When running identical tasks sequentially across 100+ isolated profiles, the underlying Rust engine bypasses the LLM entirely, executing the cached graph for true 0-Token-cost automation.
editor.new_skill_template:
# Skill: New Skill
# Description: Feature description here
# Category: Uncategorized

## Input Parameters
- {{param}}: Parameter description

## Execution Steps
1. First action...
